sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports being diagnosed with newly diagnosed hypercholesterolemia and expresses concern about the finding. He reports enjoying cycling and eating chocolate chip cookies, and mentions a family history of a cousin who died of a heart attack at age 44. He also states that he lives on his own and that no one he spends time with smokes.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure was within normal limits. Physical exam revealed no murmurs, gallops, or thyroid abnormalities. Cholesterol level was elevated at 210.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has been diagnosed with hypercholesterolemia.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: I will order a full cholesterol panel, a complete metabolic panel, thyroid studies, and liver panels. I will also order genetic testing to determine if this is familial. I will schedule a follow-up appointment in 3-6 months after the patient meets with a nutritionist and implements dietary changes. I will recommend a balanced diet low in saturated fat and sugars and encourage continued physical activity, including cycling.
medical_concepts: balanced diet low in saturated fat
balanced diet low in saturated fat
